headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $52
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Duane Pfennigwerth   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $44 to $52.
